_comment: NdFeB and SmCo grades. B_r, knee, and temperature coefficients are typical-of-grade values. Sources: Arnold Magnetic Technologies, Hitachi Metals, Vacuumschmelze public datasheets. Replace with vendor-specific values for production.

N42SH.description: NdFeB, 42 MGOe energy product, SH temperature class (max op ~150C).

N42UH.description: NdFeB, 42 MGOe, UH class (max op ~180C). For higher-temp applications.

N52.description: NdFeB, 52 MGOe, standard temp class (~80C). Highest energy product, lowest temp ceiling.

SmCo28.description: Samarium-cobalt, 28 MGOe. Lower energy product but excellent thermal stability.
